title: sticherus maritimus
intro: Sticherus maritimus, also known as the coastal forked fern, is a species of fern native to the coastal regions of Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sticherus maritimus include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and providing relief from digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
